zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry John Heath於1574年4月13日出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里 聖 馬丁時，他的父親Robert Heath36歲，母親Anna Poyser32歲。他於1598年2月12日與Alis Bartholomew在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1644年1月17日在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry John Heath于1574年4月13日出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里 聖 馬丁时，他的父亲Robert Heath36岁，母亲Anna Poyser32岁。他于1598年2月12日与Alis Bartholomew在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1644年1月17日在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heath
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(on the) heath’ (Middle English he(a)th, Old English hǣth) or else a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. The same word also denoted heather, the characteristic plant of heathland areas. This surname has also been established in Dublin, Ireland, since the late 16th century.

variants.name: Haith
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): variant of   Heath  .

variants.name: Heathman
meanings: English: topographic name denoting a dweller ‘on the heath’, from Middle English he(a)th + man(ne). Compare Heath and Heather .

variants.name: Hatton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

variants.name: Heather
meanings: English: topographic name denoting a ‘dweller on the heath’, an agent derivative of Middle English hethe; compare Heath . The name may also be habitational name from Heather (Leicestershire), from Old English hǣthor ‘heathland’ (hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + the noun suffix -or) or hǣddre ‘heather’. This surname is widespread in southern England, and also established in Ireland.

variants.name: Health
meanings: Altered form of English and Scottish   Heath  .
English and Scottish: perhaps a nickname from the vocabulary word health. — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is 105.

variants.name: Hoad
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, from Middle English hoth ‘heath’ (Old English hāth, a byform of Old English hǣth), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Hoath in Kent. This form was restricted in the Middle Ages to southeastern England, and the surname is still largely confined to Kent, Surrey, and Sussex. Compare Heath .

variants.name: Heid
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Eckhart, Gerd, Gotthilf, Heinz, Klaus, Konrad, Kurt, Manfred, Ralf, Uli.
German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name from Middle High German heide, German Heide ‘heath, moor, open, uncultivated land’. Compare Heath .
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Haido, a short form of any of various compound names beginning with haid ‘heath’ (i.e. wasteland, often with heather).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry John Heath was born on 13 April 1574, in Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, England, his father, Robert Heath, was 36 and his mother, Anna Poyser, was 32. He married Alis Bartholomew on 12 February 1598, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 January 1644, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry John Heath est né le 13 avril 1574, à Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Heath, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anna Poyser, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alis Bartholomew le 12 février 1598, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1644, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry John Heath am 13. April 1574 in Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Heath 36 und seine Mutter Anna Poyser 32. Er hat am 12. Februar 1598 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Alis Bartholomew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Januar 1644 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry John Heath è nato il il 13 aprile 1574 nel Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Heath, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Anna Poyser, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Alis Bartholomew il 12 febbraio 1598, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 gennaio 1644, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry John Heathが1574年4月13日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー スト マルティンで生まれた時，父Robert Heathは36歳，母Anna Poyserは32歳であった。1598年2月12日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでAlis Bartholomewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1644年1月17日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry John Heath(이)가 1574년 4월 13일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 스트 마틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Heath(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Poyser(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1598년 2월 12일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Alis Bartholomew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1644년 1월 17일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.13 April 1574–17 January 1644: 1574 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 13–1644 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 17

pt.13 April 1574–17 January 1644: 13 de abril de 1574–17 de janeiro de 1644
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry John Heath nasceu em 13 de abril de 1574, em Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Heath, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anna Poyser, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Alis Bartholomew em 12 de fevereiro de 1598, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1644, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry John Heath родился 13 апреля 1574 г. в местности салисбури ст мартинь, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Heath было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Poyser, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alis Bartholomew 12 февраля 1598 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 января 1644 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.13 April 1574–17 January 1644: 13 de abril de 1574–17 de enero de 1644
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry John Heath nació el 13 de abril de 1574, en Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Heath, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anna Poyser, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Alis Bartholomew el 12 de febrero de 1598, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de enero de 1644, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
